texto: In order to be really good as a librarian, everything counts towards your work, every play you go see, every concert you hear, every trip you take, everything you read, everything you know. I don’t know of another occupation like that. The more you know, the better you’re going to be.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Allen Smith: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a sabedoria. O trecho “In order to be really good as a librarian, everything counts towards your work, every play you go…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sabedoria, knowledge, librarianship pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e librarianship.
